creator: j@jedi.claranet.fr
text:
Peter Pentchev écrit:
> OK, how about the attached patch instead?

  Yeah, your patch cleans up everything so that we can easily add tons of
new README files :)

  But should we really include the README.Solaris file. I guess most users
won't check the freebsd docs to find out how to tune Solaris.

--
	     -=- Frank DENIS aka Jedi/Sector One <j@c9x.org> -=-
      "If Bill Gates had a dime for every time a Windows box crashed...
		  ... Oh, wait a minute, he already does."
